{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321133354E2D5A4CBA76C59FE20AC"}"},"total":4750},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6921207284249018381","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本书很好，主角脾气爆，三观正，不圣母，不花心，见谁怼谁，一点亏不吃，看不惯骂人的，别来看，喜欢爽文，进来你不后悔"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1611469151,"group_id":"6899022172656765966","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个玄幻世界的仙王，一个高武世界的疯子，一个现实世界的小丑","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9iT/BTdFHKOOz/O7vEORjbZpAWi9rZdrV5VTUPR8f9k","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ab9c48745b16450cbd4db46946ae3f93~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622753&x-signature=3wIRPNahi6MGRP60T1aSYP7slPY%3D","user_id":"1011145211906920","user_name":"直追天穹忘追你"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1011145211906920","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6899022172656765966","book_info":{"abstract":"无尽宙海世界，人们通过御灵水晶抽取御灵！
尹志重生回抽到最完美、最顶级、世间唯一的女帝的那一天，并激活“找死系统”，越是找死就越强。
本以为抽到一个女帝就耗尽了一辈子的运气，没想到竟然把把抽到的都是女帝？
青炎女帝，青炎燃起，黑夜化昼！
星寒女帝，口吐寒意，天地冰封！
丹医女帝，微微一笑，生死难料！
白蛇女帝，雌姿英发，万兽臣服！
面对一个个女帝御灵，尹志犯愁了：到底该先培养哪一个呢？愁啊！
对面一堆敌人，尹志表示：嘿嘿，我就喜欢看你恨不得弄死我偏偏又弄不死我的憋屈样子！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/bbb8f8f3109b6e41fa2c57fe1ef25c2f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"红叶家的长工呀","author_id":"","book_id":"6899022172656765966","book_name":"开局抽女帝，把把抽女帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4911人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6899037847006020110","read_count":"4911","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2303838"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"1093","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,重生,女帝,无脑爽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/bbb8f8f3109b6e41fa2c57fe1ef25c2f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255234&x-signature=o32n%2BJ6tC21bC2NLYGbzui3f%2BSo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321133354E2D5A4CBA76C59FE20AC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count"
